prompt.task: For each AC in spec.md, locate a test reference in test-plan.md. Return JSON: list of {ac_id, has_test (bool), test_ref (string or null), gap_reason (string or null)}. If any has_test=false, halt and return FAIL with the list of uncovered AC-IDs. Do not mark has_test=true unless the test_ref is an actual test ID or file path in test-plan.md.
prompt.rules: - Extract AC-IDs using pattern AC-[A-Z0-9]+-[0-9]+. - A test reference must be a stable ID or file path, not a prose description. - gap_reason must explain why no test exists (not yet written, scope gap, waiting on dependency). - Output FAIL as a top-level key alongside the gap list when any has_test=false.
